div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 233px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ui_prepare.py
(terminal, before skill)
--test-plan-pr or --test-plan
--tc filter, --priority
resolve creds, launch browser
write ui_context.json

div.div:
Read Context
ui_read_ctx.py
parse ui_context.json
read js-patterns.md
extract test_cases array

div.div:
2A — Preconditions
check tc["preconditions"]
oc verify if cluster-state
ui_block.py if not met

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2B — Reset
goto TARGET_URL (base)
goto TARGET_URL + route
clears filters, React state

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 143px; height: 1px; padding-top: 168px; margin-left: 977px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2C — Execute Steps
LLM-driven
ui_interact.py click/fill
scroll, goto, expand, wait
--in-row for table scoping
complete all steps first

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 138px; height: 1px; padding-top: 168px; margin-left: 1147px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2D — Assert
LLM-driven
ui_assert.py per Expected Result
--js with DOM evaluation
--screenshot with highlights
--click-before for ephemeral UI
--inspect for diagnostics

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 138px; height: 1px; padding-top: 328px; margin-left: 1147px;

div.div:
2E — End TC
log verdict (PASS/FAIL)
ui_block.py --incomplete
on crash or disconnect

div.div:
BLOCKED / Skip
precondition not met
no browser action possible
logged via ui_block.py
